spanish corriendo: gat corr
basque stemming lowercases and removes suffixes: katu etxean
unknown language lowercases: hello world
empty text: 
punctuation stripped: run quick
all stopwords become empty: 
english longer sentence: beauti organ run nation garden
english mixed punctuation and numbers: hello world 123 test run fast

spanish with accents: music español fantast
basque longer sentence: ikasle eskol joan ziren liburu irakurri zitu
basque with punctuation: katu etxean etxea
english possessives: cat s tail dog bone
spanish question words: dond quien vien
english uppercase with stopwords: quick brown fox jump over lazi dog
